prestazioni: Engine swap to 2GR-FKS (3.5L V6) with a Magnuson TVS2300 supercharger (12psi boost), paired with a TOMs 8-speed automatic transmission reinforcement kit and a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential for the U680E gearbox

Full Tomei Powered EXPREME exhaust system (3.5-inch titanium headers, 2.5-inch stainless mid-pipe with GReddy SP2 mufflers) and a HKS Hi-Power intercooler with custom piping for the 2GR-FKS forced induction setup

BC Racing BR coilovers with Swift springs (8kg/mm front, 7kg/mm rear) and Cusco front/rear strut tower bars, combined with Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and SuperPro poly bushings for the S210 chassis
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (S210-specific, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders and a Veilside Fortune front bumper conversion

Rocket Bunny V3 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,500mm span) and a custom 3D-printed front splitter with integrated canards (Aeroflow Dynamics design), paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (S210-specific, 5kg weight reduction)

Work Meister S1 3P 19x9.5 +30 front / 19x11 +45 rear wheels with Toyo R888R 255/35/19 and 295/30/19 tires, wrapped in custom matte bronze with JDM-spec Toyota Crown RS badging and LED taillight overlays (Vland design)
